buildCommand: bun run build && mkdir -p .vercel/output/functions/index.func && cp dist/index.mjs .vercel/output/functions/index.func/ && echo '{"runtime":"nodejs22.x","handler":"index.mjs","launcherType":"Nodejs"}' > .vercel/output/functions/index.func/.vc-config.json && echo '{"version":3}' > .vercel/output/config.json
